name: GOLFTEC Huntersville
address: 9911 Rose Commons Dr F, Huntersville, NC 28078
about: GOLFTEC is a technology-driven golf training and club fitting studio offering personalized instruction and professional club fitting services. Utilizing advanced technology like OPTIMOTION motion capture, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors, the studio provides data-driven feedback to help golfers improve their swing and game. Lessons are structured to be goal-oriented, starting with a Swing Evaluation to create a personalized game plan for long-term progress.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven instruction using advanced motion capture and launch monitor technology
Personalized game plans created by certified coaches for structured improvement
Professional club fitting services that can add up to 21 more yards off the tee on average
Access to practice memberships with training bays equipped with simulators and feedback systems

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of on-site food service available.
No mention of alcohol service or BYOB policy.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can use your own clubs, or GOLFTEC provides equipment. The studio also offers club fitting and sales services.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink service, so it is recommended to confirm directly with the location.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC focuses on lessons and practice rather than full 18-hole simulators, but they do offer virtual practice environments through their OPTI technology.

faq.question: Is GOLFTEC kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers junior golf programs and is suitable for youth golfers.
